originContent: **The development of the master branch is currently frozen, (only urgent bug fix will be pushed), the new version of beampy is currently developped in the dev branch which is still not enouth stable to use...**
translatedContent: **The development of the master branch is currently frozen, (only urgent bug fix will be pushed), the new version of beampy is currently developped in the dev branch which is still not enouth stable to use...**

originContent: Beampy is a python tool to create slide-show in svg that can be displayed with HTML5
translatedContent: Beampy is a python tool to create slide-show in svg that can be displayed with HTML5

originContent: The size of slides is fixed, like in a Latex Beamer document.
translatedContent: The size of slides is fixed, like in a Latex Beamer document.

originContent: Beampy presentation output only one html file with every contents embedded.
translatedContent: Beampy presentation output only one html file with every contents embedded.

originContent: maketitle('Beampy a tool to make simple presentation', ['H. Chauvet'])
translatedContent: maketitle('Beampy a tool to make simple presentation', ['H. Chauvet'])

originContent: text(r'Use LaTeX to render text and $$\sqrt{10}$$', align='center')
translatedContent: text(r'Use LaTeX to render text and $$\sqrt{10}$$', align='center')

originContent: with slide('Beampy test with animated layers'):
translatedContent: with slide('Beampy test with animated layers'):

originContent: text(r'Use LaTeX to render text and $$\sqrt{10}$$', align='center')[1]
translatedContent: text(r'Use LaTeX to render text and $$\sqrt{10}$$', align='center')[1]

originContent: * Fix important issues with encoding for python 2 and 3.
translatedContent: * Fix important issues with encoding for python 2 and 3.

originContent: * Fix problems with missing references in svg generated by dvisvgm
translatedContent: * Fix problems with missing references in svg generated by dvisvgm

translatedContent: the whole story), which creates missing part of latex stuff in the

originContent: * Better management of the temporary files
translatedContent: * Better management of the temporary files

originContent: * Update scour (svg optimizer to it's last version)
translatedContent: * Update scour (svg optimizer to its latest version)

originContent: * Beampy is now python 3 and 2 compatible (at least 2.7 and 3.7) !
translatedContent: * Beampy is now python 3 and 2 compatible (at least 2.7 and 3.7) !

originContent: * Introduce integrated testing with pytest framework (still no unit-tests of the core functions of beampy)
translatedContent: * Introduce integrated testing with pytest framework (still no unit-tests of the core functions of beampy)

originContent: * Fix bug when save multiple format at the same time, no more duplication of texts [issue #13](https://github.com/hchauvet/beampy/issues/13)
translatedContent: * Fix bug when saving multiple formats at the same time, no more duplication of texts [issue #13](https://github.com/hchauvet/beampy/issues/13)

originContent: * Add option to specify the location of the presentation source file ( doc = document(source_filename=__name__) )
translatedContent: * Add option to specify the location of the presentation source file ( doc = document(source_filename=__name__) )

originContent: * Fix bug in layer propagation for box
translatedContent: * Fix bug in layer propagation for box

originContent: * Fix bug when last layer is set as [n:]
translatedContent: * Fix bug when last layer is set as [n:]

originContent: * Fix bug with dvisvgm output for tikz dvi (function latex2svg has now
translatedContent: * Fix bug with dvisvgm output for tikz dvi (function latex2svg now has

originContent: an option to write the svg produced by dvisvgm).
translatedContent: an option to write the svg produced by dvisvgm).

originContent: * Extra latex packages could be added to text module with the
translatedContent: * Extra latex packages can be added to text module with the

originContent: * Compute svg rectangle and circle size which improve the rendering
translatedContent: * Compute svg rectangle and circle size which improve the rendering

originContent: * Improve box module (it is now a subclass of group) [See documentation](https://hchauvet.github.io/beampy/auto_examples/plot_box.html).
translatedContent: * Improve box module (it is now a subclass of group) [See documentation](https://hchauvet.github.io/beampy/auto_examples/plot_box.html).

originContent: * Correct some scale factors in the convert_unit function.
translatedContent: * Correct some scale factors in the convert_unit function.

originContent: * Width and height are now Length objects and accept complex
translatedContent: * Width and height are now Length objects and accept complex

originContent: # width/height relative to the a element
translatedContent: # width/height relative to the a element

originContent: * module position (x,y) operation now accept Length objects (width/height):
translatedContent: * module position (x,y) operation now accepts Length objects (width/height):

originContent: * Change the core of beampy to render elements when needed for
translatedContent: * Change the core of beampy to render elements when needed for

originContent: operation on position or length (i.e. when you make an operation on
translatedContent: operation on position or length (i.e. when you make an operation on

originContent: an element width or height that is unknown, the element will be
translatedContent: an element width or height that is unknown, the element will be

originContent: rendered to get its size and allow the operation)
translatedContent: rendered to get its size and allow the operation)

originContent: * Add "zorder" operation for modules (above/below/last/first) to change
translatedContent: * Add "zorder" operation for modules (above/below/last/first) to change

originContent: # equivalent to a.above(b) or a.last() or b.first()
translatedContent: # equivalent to a.above(b) or a.last() or b.first()

originContent: * Fix several bugs in bokeh figures (thx to [Silmathoron](https://github.com/Silmathoron))
translatedContent: * Fix several bugs in bokeh figures (thx to [Silmathoron](https://github.com/Silmathoron))

originContent: * Fix bokeh figure resizing, it's now use the "sizing_mode = scale_both" from bokeh and revert the css transform scaling for the bokeh div.
translatedContent: * Fix bokeh figure resizing, it's now use the "sizing_mode = scale_both" from bokeh and revert the css transform scaling for the bokeh div.

originContent: * Fix javascript loader for bokeh (new bokeh version (>0.12.6) named their main div "bk_root")
translatedContent: * Fix javascript loader for bokeh (new bokeh version (>0.12.6) named their main div "bk_root")

originContent: * Add function to cache file in beampy cache class
translatedContent: * Add function to cache file in beampy cache class

originContent: * Cache javascript external libraries files from bokeh (download from their CDN, if "doc = document(cache=False)")
translatedContent: * Cache javascript external libraries files from bokeh (download from their CDN, if "doc = document(cache=False)")

originContent: * Add box function to decorate group
translatedContent: * Add box function to decorate group

originContent: * New experimental way to write text inside presentation using context manager
translatedContent: * New experimental way to write text inside presentation using context manager

originContent: Any comment inside the context manager will be passed to the
translatedContent: Any comment inside the context manager will be passed to the

originContent: text function as input argument. This allows clearer source
translatedContent: text function as input argument. This allows clearer source

originContent: No more need to add an *r* before to protect the text passed to
translatedContent: No more need to add an *r* before to protect the text passed to

originContent: * Correct bug when only html object are present in one slide
translatedContent: * Correct bug when only html object are present in one slide

originContent: * Correct small typos in the install section of the documentation.
translatedContent: * Correct small typos in the install section of the documentation.

originContent: * Add 'anchor' key to position dictionary to define anchor along the
translatedContent: * Add 'anchor' key to position dictionary to define anchor along the

originContent: bounding-box of module to place them.
translatedContent: bounding-box of module to place them.

originContent: * Add utils.py to store functions that call beampy modules.
translatedContent: * Add utils.py to store functions that call beampy modules.

originContent: * Add function **bounding_box(module)** to utils.py to draw bounding box with
translatedContent: * Add function **bounding_box(module)** to utils.py to draw bounding box with

originContent: anchors around Beampy modules. Add also a function to draw axes on slide,
translatedContent: anchors around Beampy modules. Add also a function to draw axes on slide,

originContent: * Introduce layer mechanism. Slide elements can be animated by layers allowing mechanism like beamer "\only".
translatedContent: * Introduce layer mechanism. Slide elements can be animated by layers allowing mechanism like beamer "\only".

originContent: The layer are managed as python slicing on Beampy modules.
translatedContent: The layers are managed as python slicing on Beampy modules.

originContent: * The core of Beampy slide processor has been rewritten and now allows recursive group of elements.
translatedContent: * The core of Beampy slide processor has been rewritten and now allows recursive group of elements.

originContent: * If a group width is given all elements in groups without specified width take the width of the group
translatedContent: * If a group width is given all elements in groups without specified width take the width of the group

originContent: # Figure and text width will be automatically set to 200 px
translatedContent: # Figure and text width will be automatically set to 200 px

originContent: * Relative placement now could be done on auto positioned elements
translatedContent: * Relative placement can now be done on auto-positioned elements

originContent: * Video now could use external links (with *embedded=True*) rather than be included in the html file.
translatedContent: * Video now could use external links (with *embedded=True*) rather than be included in the html file.

originContent: The video is loaded from disk (be careful with file path) when the slide is displayed on screen.
translatedContent: The video is loaded from disk (be careful with file path) when the slide is displayed on screen.

originContent: * All texts are preprocessed in a single latex file (Latex is called only once: improve compilation time)
translatedContent: * All texts are preprocessed in a single latex file (Latex is called only once: improve compilation time)

originContent: * Cache bug fix: Video and svg are now cached correctly
translatedContent: * Cache bug fix: Video and svg are now cached correctly

originContent: * Improve cache: one file per element cached (don't write the cache twice!)
translatedContent: * Improve cache: one file per element cached (don't write the cache twice!)

originContent: * Svg: Add line and rectangle commands to easily draw lines and rectangles
translatedContent: * Svg: Add line and rectangle commands to easily draw lines and rectangles

originContent: * Relative placement: add shortcut center(shift), right(shift) and bottom(shift)
translatedContent: * Relative placement: add shortcut center(shift), right(shift) and bottom(shift)

originContent: to change the anchor of the current element.
translatedContent: to change the anchor of the current element.

originContent: * Matplotlib figures can now be directly passed to *figure()* or a list of matplotlib figures can be animated with *animatesvg()*
translatedContent: * Matplotlib figures can now be directly passed to *figure()* or a list of matplotlib figures can be animated with *animatesvg()*

originContent: * Minor improvement in cache size (content is no more stored in cache file)
translatedContent: * Minor improvement in cache size (content is no more stored in cache file)

originContent: * Glyph paths from Latex are now unique (this reduce the number of svg lines in documents)
translatedContent: * Glyph paths from Latex are now unique (this reduce the number of svg lines in documents)

originContent: * Add *svg* command ton include raw svg in slide
translatedContent: * Add *svg* command to include raw svg in slide

originContent: * Improve the theme flexibility, a background with interactive elements can now be created!
translatedContent: * Improve the theme flexibility, a background with interactive elements can now be created!

originContent: * All slide are now loaded into ram, improve speed
translatedContent: * All slide are now loaded into ram, improve speed

originContent: * Modules are now classes which inherit from a base class "beampy_module" in modules/core.py
translatedContent: * Modules are now classes which inherit from a base class "beampy_module" in modules/core.py

originContent: * cache is now unique for all format (pdf, svg, html) and special keys can be added
translatedContent: * cache is now unique for all format (pdf, svg, html) and special keys can be added

originContent: to modules in order to create their chache id
translatedContent: to modules in order to create their chache id
